{{Quote|That ''electronically-charged fabric'' will keep any scanner from picking up what's ''under'' it.|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 31">[[Star Wars (1977) 31|''Star Wars'' (1977) 31]]</ref>}}
[[Fabritech/Legends|Fabritech's]] '''CN-15 camouflage netting''' was formed of netting made up of metallic jamming fibers which produced a reflective ability that avoided detection from standard sensor sweeps. Late in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] banned its production due to the netting's usefulness to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]]. It needed to be connected to a small power source for maximum effectiveness. The net was covered in overlapping sensor baffle scales that emulated the emissions of the surrounding terrain. It came in a small backpack and was deployable by two people in under a minute. Fully expanded, it would cover a 15 square meter area. It was once tested underwater by the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Gunman]], and worked just as effectively, so long as the power cell lasted.<ref name="gundark" />
